query: SELECT m.id, m.conversationId, m.role, LEFT(m.content, 200) as content_preview, m.createdAt FROM messages m JOIN conversations c ON m.conversationId = c.id WHERE c.channel = 'line' ORDER BY m.createdAt DESC LIMIT 30;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user fb6ZvqfLuJXoq6N.546e92496cc7 --database YQVYVFB6KqQhPVgwGtGztr --execute SELECT m.id, m.conversationId, m.role, LEFT(m.content, 200) as content_preview, m.createdAt FROM messages m JOIN conversations c ON m.conversationId = c.id WHERE c.channel = 'line' ORDER BY m.createdAt DESC LIMIT 30;
